mapper.sql: id, user_id, symbol, asset_type, direction, leverage, hold_quantity, available_quantity, open_price, margin, liquidation_price, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM trade_position ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_position (user_id, symbol, asset_type, direction, leverage, hold_quantity, available_quantity, open_price, margin, liquidation_price, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{symbol}, #{assetType}, #{direction}, #{leverage}, #{holdQuantity}, #{availableQuantity}, #{openPrice}, #{margin}, #{liquidationPrice}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE trade_position SET user_id = #{userId}, symbol = #{symbol}, asset_type = #{assetType}, direction = #{direction}, leverage = #{leverage}, hold_quantity = #{holdQuantity}, available_quantity = #{availableQuantity}, open_price = #{openPrice}, margin = #{margin}, liquidation_price = #{liquidationPrice}, status = #{status}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
